meta.name: kh_eval_v0
meta.note: KH PoC eval set. Clean-ad texts are VERBATIM excerpts from saved real PPCBank pages (source_url + source_file recorded per item) — nothing invented. PoC: not reviewed by a Cambodian lawyer. Facebook real-ad item deferred (2순위).
meta.stability_protocol: flagship item kh-eval-01 runs 3x; expect same verdict 3/3

items.label: khmer_violation_flagship
items.title: PPCBank Fixed Deposit (Khmer)
items.content_text: ប្រាក់បញ្ញើមានកាលកំណត់ PPCBank — អត្រាការប្រាក់ខ្ពស់បំផុតសម្រាប់គ្រប់គ្នា ដោយគ្មានលក្ខខណ្ឌ! ដកប្រាក់បានគ្រប់ពេល ជាមួយការប្រាក់ពេញ។
items.provenance: Synthetic violation ad (Khmer), used in CC-5 E2E. Meaning: 'highest rate for everyone, no conditions! withdraw anytime with full interest.'

items.label: english_violation
items.title: PPCBank Fixed Deposit — Special Offer
items.content_text: PPCBank Fixed Deposit — the highest rate for everyone, no conditions. Withdraw anytime with full interest!
items.provenance: Synthetic violation ad (English), used in CC-3/CC-6 E2E.

items.label: clean_real_page_copy
items.title: PPCBank Fixed Deposit
items.content_text: Earn interest on the money you deposit. If you have savings that you don’t plan to use anytime soon, a fixed deposit account will allow your money to grow with a specific interest rate depending. The longer you commit your money to being in the account, the higher the interest rate will be. Open a fixed deposit account at PPCBank today, it’s easy. Make your money work for you and let it grow.
items.provenance: VERBATIM from PPCBank's real product page (data/cambodia/products/ppcbank_fixed_deposit.md lines 14-16). Source: https://www.ppcbank.com.kh/personal-banking/deposit/fixed-deposit-account/

expected.product_comparison: PRELOADED; no CONTRADICTED (copy discloses term-dependent rates)
expected.note: 실광고이므로 위반 판정이 나오면 근거와 함께 그대로 보고 (숨기지 않음)

items.title: PPCBank Fixed Deposit
items.content_text:
Earn interest on the money you deposit.
If you have savings that you don’t plan to use anytime soon, a fixed deposit account will allow your money to grow with a specific interest rate depending. The longer you commit your money to being in the account, the higher the interest rate will be.
Open a fixed deposit account at PPCBank today, it’s easy. Make your money work for you and let it grow.

items.provenance: kh-eval-03의 (b)안 후속: 같은 페이지의 금리표(기간·통화·채널, 만기/월지급)와 자격요건(Requirements)까지 포함한 전문. VERBATIM from data/cambodia/products/ppcbank_fixed_deposit.md. Source: https://www.ppcbank.com.kh/personal-banking/deposit/fixed-deposit-account/

expected.note: 2026-07-02 관찰값 기반 기대치: 조건 공시 포함 시 위반 단정이 사라지고 회부로 완화됨(revise→needs_review). pass_candidate는 미달 — 데모 ⑤는 (a)안(kh-eval-04 회부 내러티브) 채택

items.label: clean_real_promotion
items.title: PPCBank Royal Celebration Promotion
items.content_text: PPCBank is pleased to launch the “Royal Celebration” promotion. Customers can enjoy a special interest rate of up to 5.14% p.a. when opening a USD Fixed Deposit account via PPCBank Mobile App or smartBiz. Promotion Period: May 1 – May 15, 2026.
items.provenance: VERBATIM from PPCBank's real product page (data/cambodia/products/ppcbank_fixed_deposit.md line 10-12). Source: https://www.ppcbank.com.kh/personal-banking/deposit/fixed-deposit-account/

expected.product_comparison: PRELOADED; promotional_rate fact should SUPPORT ('up to 5.14%' + channel + period disclosed)
expected.note: 실광고이므로 위반 판정이 나오면 근거와 함께 그대로 보고

items.label: car_loan_real_copy_optional
items.title: PPCBank Auto Loan
items.content_text: Drive Your Dream Car Sooner with a PPCBank Auto Loan. Whether it’s brand new or gently used, PPCBank offers auto loans with low, competitive interest rates that help you get on the road faster. Enjoy a quick and easy approval process, flexible repayment options, and trusted support every step of the way.
items.provenance: VERBATIM from PPCBank's real car-loan page (data/cambodia/products/ppcbank_car_loan.md lines 8-13). Source: https://www.ppcbank.com.kh/personal-banking/loan/car-loan/

expected.product_comparison: no preloaded facts for Car Loan → legacy path → NO_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT (문서 대조 생략)
expected.note: 'low, competitive / easy approval' 수준의 마케팅 표현 — needs_review 가능성 있음, 결과 그대로 보고. NBC 금리상한(KH-CU-05)은 placeholder라 대출 금리 주제는 데모에서 피할 것
